_note: Historical artifact migrated from snackbyte-base specs/004-clickup-sync. Runtime ClickUp IDs (workspaceId/spaceId/listId, card.id, userStories[].id) and content hashes have been stripped — they were snackbyte-base's live sync targets, not this repo's.
